scope: U.S. school and library bans/challenges first; rights-ready shortlist before maximum title volume.
licenseModel: RAG only: retrieval, citation, summarization, educational use, optional commercial use, limited excerpt allowance, revocation, payout participation; fine-tuning excluded for v1.

sourceSpine.name: ALA Most Challenged Books
sourceSpine.role: Annual challenged-title evidence and censorship trend context.

sourceSpine.name: PEN America Index of School Book Bans
sourceSpine.role: School-ban index source spine for title-level discovery and jurisdiction evidence.

sourceSpine.name: EveryLibrary Banned Book Database
sourceSpine.role: Secondary title discovery and public advocacy evidence.

sourceSpine.name: NCAC and publisher/author pages
sourceSpine.role: Enrichment for public statements, advocacy context, and rightsholder contact paths.
